Widget Pro - Product Specification

Model: WP-2025
Weight: 340g
Dimensions: 142mm x 68mm x 9.2mm
Battery Life: 18 hours continuous use
Charging: USB-C, 45W fast charge (0-80% in 35 minutes)
Connectivity: Bluetooth 5.3, Wi-Fi 6E
Display: 6.1" OLED, 2400x1080, 120Hz
Processor: SnapTech A9, 8-core
Storage: 128GB / 256GB options
Price: $129.99 (128GB), $159.99 (256GB)
Colors: Midnight Black, Arctic White, Ocean Blue
Warranty: 2-year limited
